posts.text: Few officials in the Gulf expect the war to restart. But nor do they expect a durable peace https://www.economist.com/middle-east-and-africa/2026/06/25/the-gulfs-three-post-war-challenges?taid=6a3f8307c4ec02000190467c&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text: BREAKING: The US Pentagon delayed publicly announcing US strikes on Iran until after the US stock market had closed at 4 PM ET on Friday, per NBC News. The timing of the announcement was reportedly intended to "reduce the immediate impact on financial markets."
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text: We’re so deep into our stupid internal political turf wars, trying to win silly points against each other, that we forget what real leadership looks like. Real men, do important stuff. Losers stand around and debate….
posts.author: hkuppy
